requirement_topic.en: Jamaica Grid Interconnection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 110/220 V, 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 牙买加并网接入——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据及110/220 V、50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 牙買加併網接入——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據及110/220 V、50 Hz參數

summary.en: Solar PV inverters intended for grid connection in Jamaica should be documented for JPS interconnection review and OUR-regulated electricity-sector requirements. Practical inverter evidence normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, plus project-specific protection settings for Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz grid. Jamaica has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the service voltage is materially different: 110 V single-phase and 220 V split-phase, with US-influenced distribution practice, instead of China's 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase baseline.
summary.zh: 拟在牙买加并网的太阳能光伏逆变器，应为JPS接入审查及OUR监管的电力部门要求准备文件。实际逆变器证据通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，以及针对牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz电网的项目保护设置。牙买加与中国同为50 Hz，但服务电压存在实质差异：牙买加为110 V单相和220 V分相，并受美国配电实践影响，而中国基准为220 V单相和380 V三相。
summary.zht: 擬在牙買加併網的太陽能光伏逆變器，應為JPS接入審查及OUR監管的電力部門要求準備文件。實際逆變器證據通常包括IEC 62116防孤島測試證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，以及針對牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz電網的項目保護設置。牙買加與中國同為50 Hz，但服務電壓存在實質差異：牙買加為110 V單相和220 V分相，並受美國配電實務影響，而中國基準為220 V單相和380 V三相。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Jamaica Public Service (JPS) interconnection and project review requirements for grid-connected generation
Office of Utilities Regulation (OUR) electricity-sector oversight

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station connection, NB/T 32004 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 for inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding results. These documents are built around Chinese grid conditions and domestic acceptance routes. They do not automatically satisfy JPS or project-owner review in Jamaica, especially where inverter protection settings were validated only for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件围绕中国电网条件和国内接受路径建立，不会自动满足牙买加JPS或项目业主审查，特别是逆变器保护设置仅按中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网验证的情形。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件圍繞中國電網條件和國內接受路徑建立，不會自動滿足牙買加JPS或項目業主審查，特別是逆變器保護設置僅按中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網驗證的情形。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection documents should not be treated as automatic substitutes for Jamaica interconnection evidence. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test reports for the supplied inverter model, document anti-islanding and reconnection settings, and validate firmware for Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz service conditions. The frequency match with China reduces one configuration issue, but the voltage mismatch is material and can affect protection thresholds, nuisance trips, and interconnection approval.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不应被视为牙买加接入证据的自动替代。出口商应准备所供逆变器型号的IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试报告，记录防孤岛和重连设置，并针对牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz供电条件验证固件。与中国同为50 Hz可减少一项配置问题，但电压差异具有实质影响，可能影响保护阈值、误跳闸和接入批准。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不應被視為牙買加接入證據的自動替代。出口商應準備所供逆變器型號的IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試報告，記錄防孤島和重連設置，並針對牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz供電條件驗證韌體。與中國同為50 Hz可減少一項配置問題，但電壓差異具有實質影響，可能影響保護閾值、誤跳閘和接入批准。

mandatory_status.target: Project-level grid interconnection evidence is expected for JPS-connected solar projects and should be confirmed with JPS, OUR rules, and the project engineer before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-operator requirements but does not automatically transfer to Jamaica JPS interconnection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Jamaica interconnection as a separate JPS and project-engineer review from China domestic grid approval. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and verify inverter firmware against Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz grid before submission. Do not rely on GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408-2021 as automatically accepted substitutes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将牙买加接入视为独立于中国国内并网批准的JPS及项目工程师审查。提交前请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并按牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz电网验证逆变器固件。不要依赖GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408-2021作为自动接受的替代证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將牙買加接入視為獨立於中國國內併網批准的JPS及項目工程師審查。提交前請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並按牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz電網驗證逆變器韌體。不要依賴GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408-2021作為自動接受的替代證據。
